seoTitle: Suffolk Park vs Summer Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Suffolk Park and Summer Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Suffolk Park vs Summer Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Suffolk Park and Summer Hill.
heading: Suffolk Park vs Summer Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Suffolk Park, New South Wales and Summer Hill, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Suffolk Park has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Summer Hill (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Suffolk Park or Summer Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Suffolk Park has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Summer Hill scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Suffolk Park scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Summer Hill scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Suffolk Park or Summer Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Suffolk Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
